title: Position record
description: A single benchmark position with redundant representations (PLAN.md §1.1). One JSON record is the source of truth for both text and image tracks. STUB: fields are indicative, not final.

position_id.description: Stable internal id (typically derived from the normalized XGID hash).

xgid.description: Canonical XGID string; primary key and dedup source (PLAN.md §1.1).

gnubg_id.description: Secondary ID for GNU BG interop (PLAN.md §1.1).

board_json.description: Unambiguous machine-readable board, always from the player-to-move's perspective (PLAN.md §1.1).

points.description: 26-item array (indices 0..25) from the mover's perspective. Indices 1-24 are board points; positive = mover (x), negative = opponent (o). Indices 0 and 25 are reserved sentinels and MUST be 0 (bar/off live in their own fields). The mover advances from low indices to high indices, bears off beyond index 24, and has its home board on indices 19-24 (index 24 = ace point, 1 pip from off). See bgcore/board.py.

bar.description: Checkers on the bar. x = mover, o = opponent.

off.description: Checkers borne off (not encoded in XGID/GNU BG IDs; derived as 15 minus on-board minus bar). x = mover, o = opponent.

turn.description: Mover's physical seat as tracked by external IDs: 'x' = the ID's bottom/player-1 seat, 'o' = the top/player-2 seat. The layout itself is always mover-relative; this field only lets XGID/GNU BG IDs round-trip losslessly.

dice.description: The roll to be played (checker decisions); empty/absent for cube decisions.

cube.description: Doubling cube. value is the face value (a power of two); owner is 'center' (nobody), 'x' (mover owns) or 'o' (opponent owns).

length.description: Match length; 0 or absent for money play.

image_png.description: Path/ref to rendered PNG (image-track payload); may be absent for held-out.

image_svg.description: Path/ref to source SVG for deterministic re-rasterization.

tier.description: Human-difficulty tier (PLAN.md §3.2), derived from expected_expert_loss / expert_miss_rate.

expected_expert_loss.description: EEL: predicted mean equity loss (millipoints) for a reference PR-3 human on this decision (PLAN.md §3.1).

expert_miss_rate.description: Predicted probability a reference PR-3 human picks a non-best move (PLAN.md §3.1).

difficulty_source.description: Most authoritative source behind the tier assignment (PLAN.md §3.1).

rollout_ref.description: Reference/key into rollouts/ ground-truth data for this position.

canary.description: Embedded canary token (BENCH-CANARY-<uuid>) for published artifacts (PLAN.md §2.5).
